$comment: Default settings for burnRat. User overrides are written to settings.json (gitignored). All values here are safe, tunable magic numbers — no logic depends on hardcoded numbers elsewhere.

display.$note: Rate-readout auto-scale. Prefer tok/sec (granular); drop to tok/min only when the per-second value would round below ~1. The gap between the two cutoffs is hysteresis so the unit doesn't flip-flop on a noisy signal.
